title: Inscribed
description: Adds more variation to chiseled sandstone and chiseled red sandstone
body:
🏜️ **Inscribed** add many variations to _chiseled sandstone_ and _chiseled red sandstone_


![Inscribed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3b51b559449a98bcf74617c97ce823a091fed1.png)
# 
**changes:**

- 🎨  textures variations to _chiseled sandstone_ and _chiseled red sandstone_ 

# 
🏺 The long-forgotten and sand-covered inscriptions in the pyramids keep many _secrets_... will you be able to understand this _ancient language_?
